description: A survey of the climate system and its interaction with past, present and future societies. Topics include: climate change and the onset of agriculture/domestication, climate change and the rise and fall of early civilizations, the anthropocene and global warming. The interplay between science, media, public relations and public policy is also addressed.
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of ES 365, EOS 365.
title: Climate and Society
